title: pilosella glaucescens subsp. adenocyma
intro: Pilosella glaucescens subsp. adenocyma, also known as a subspecies of the plant Pilosella glaucescens, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to certain mountainous regions. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may aid in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Pilosella glaucescens subsp. adenocyma include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off bacterial and fungal infections, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
